svg.title: MemVid AI - Kien truc va luong nghiep vu end-to-end
svg.desc: So do kien truc day du cua MemVid AI: FE, Flask API, LangGraph graphs, retrieval, LLM, storage

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Mo ta chi tiet Frontend React cua MemVid AI')
sendPrompt('Mo ta cac endpoint chinh cua main.py trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Mo ta jobs_store va sessions_store trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich ingest_utils.py: extract_text va split_text')
sendPrompt('Giai thich chunk_processor.py va video_utils trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich vector_store.py va FAISS index trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich memory_tree.py trong MemVid AI')
sendPrompt('Giai thich CacheLookupNode trong QueryGraph MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich RetrieveMemoryTreeNode trong QueryGraph')
sendPrompt('Giai thich HybridRetriever BM25 FAISS RRF trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich ContextBuilderNode va source citation trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich GenerateAnswerNode va qa_chain trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich FinalizeNode va SSE streaming trong QueryGraph MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich conversation memory va sessions_store trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich MindmapGraph va mindmap_generation_worker trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich summarize_advanced va llm_factory trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich llm_factory.py va cac AI provider trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich FAISS index va index.json trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich memory tree storage trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich video QR storage trong MemVid')
sendPrompt('Giai thich SQLite jobs logs checkpoints trong MemVid')

svg.text: USE_LC_VECTOR_STORE · USE_LC_ENSEMBLE · USE_LC_QA_CHAIN · EVAL_ENABLED · MINDMAP_MODEL · OLLAMA_MODEL
